title: Test behavior when using an expired password reset link
description: Ensures that a password reset link is invalid after its 1-hour expiry time and that the user is shown an appropriate error.
preconditions: A user has requested a password reset link.
More than 60 minutes have passed since the link was generated.

steps.description: 1. Request a password reset link for a valid account.
3. Click the password reset link from the email.

expected_result: The user is redirected to a page or shown a message indicating the link is expired or invalid (e.g., 'INVALID_TOKEN'). The user should be prompted to request a new link.
